invalid-api-key: The provided API key is invalid.
user-not-found: The specified user could not be found.
jwt-not-acceptable: The JWT token is not acceptable.
invalid-signed-url: The signed URL is invalid or expired.
hash-mismatch: The provided hash does not match.
invalid-auth-header-value: The authorization header value is invalid.
unsupported-auth-scheme: The authentication scheme is not supported.
bad-org-status: The organization status is not valid.
user-not-exists-in-organization-manageme: The user does not exist in organization management.
user-not-exists-in-organization: The user does not exist in the organization.
token-not-found: The authentication token was not found.
route-not-found: The requested route was not found.
method-not-allowed: The HTTP method is not allowed for this route.
network-error: A network error occurred. Please try again.
zod-error: Validation failed for the provided data.
self-permission-mismatch: Permission mismatch for '{{permission}}' on '{{key}}'. Required: '{{required}}', but got: '{{got}}'.
invalid-actor: The actor '{{currentActor}}' is not supported. Supported actors are: {{supportedActors}}.
permission-explicitly-denied: The permission '{{deniedPermission}}' has been explicitly denied.
invalid-multipart-upload-part-number: The provided multipart upload part number is invalid.
object-not-found: The requested media object was not found.
media-too-large: The media '{{mediaID}}' exceeds the maximum allowed size. Current size: {{currentSize}}, maximum supported size: {{maxSupportedSize}}.
media-items-limit-exceeded: The number of media items ({{currentLength}}) exceeds the maximum allowed ({{maxItemsSupported}}).
upload-already-completed: The upload has already been completed.
unsupported-object-uploaded: The uploaded object type is not supported.
complete-multipart-upload-called-too-soo: A complete multipart upload operation is already in progress for this upload.
singlepart-upload-failed: Single part upload failed for media '{{mediaID}}'.
multipart-part-upload-failed: Multipart upload failed for media '{{mediaID}}' at part number {{partNumber}}.
missing-etag-value: Missing ETag value for media '{{mediaID}}' at part number {{partNumber}}.
invalid-cursor-value: The provided cursor value is invalid.
unknown-field-in-request-body: The request body contains unknown or unsupported fields.
empty-request-body: The request body cannot be empty.
request-body-too-large: The request body exceeds the maximum allowed size of {{limit}}.
malformed-response-body: The server returned a malformed response body.
invalid-response-shape: The server response format is invalid.
unknown-server-error: An unknown error occurred on the server.
